tagline: An Industrial-Level Controllable and Efficient Zero-Shot Text-To-Speech System
description:
IndexTTS2 is an advanced zero-shot text-to-speech model that innovatively achieves complete decoupling of emotional expression and speaker identity. The model supports precise speech duration control and multimodal emotion control, capable of maintaining the target timbre while accurately reproducing the specified emotional intonation.

The model employs a three-stage training paradigm and introduces GPT latent representations, ensuring excellent speech clarity and stability even under high emotional expression. Through the Qwen-based soft instruction mechanism, users can easily control the emotional characteristics of generated speech using natural language descriptions.

In multi-dataset evaluations, IndexTTS2 surpasses existing zero-shot TTS models in key metrics such as word error rate, speaker similarity, and emotion fidelity, providing industry-leading speech synthesis quality.

**Key Features:**
- Zero-shot TTS capability to replicate any timbre without training
- Independent control of emotion and timbre with multimodal emotion input
- Precise duration control with explicit token count specification for perfect audio-video synchronization
- Natural language-based emotion control to guide speech generation through text descriptions

**Additional Notes:**
- Please ensure available memory > 12 GB, otherwise the application may not run properly
- This application runs on CPU by default. This mode has low computational efficiency and will cause extremely high resource consumption and potential system instability. For optimal performance and stability, it is strongly recommended to use NVIDIA GPU to run this application
- If you need to use NVIDIA GPU, please select "Custom Install" and enable the GPU option (supported in ZimaOS 1.5.0 and above)
- For NVIDIA GPU usage, ≥ 8 GB VRAM is required (recommended for optimal performance)
- For NVIDIA GPU usage, NVIDIA CUDA Toolkit version ≥ 12.8 is required

**Learn More:**
- [IndexTTS GitHub](https://github.com/index-tts/index-tts)
author: index-tts

tips.before_install:
1. Please ensure available memory > 12 GB, otherwise the application may not run properly
2. The application takes approximately 5 minutes to start, please be patient
3. This application runs on CPU by default. This mode has low computational efficiency and will cause extremely high resource consumption and potential system instability. For optimal performance and stability, it is strongly recommended to use NVIDIA GPU to run this application
4. If you need to use NVIDIA GPU, please select "Custom Install" and enable the GPU option (supported in ZimaOS 1.5.0 and above)

releaseNotes.en_US:
- IndexTTS 2.0 tracks the upstream IndexTTS2 release.
- IndexTTS2 adds controllable and uncontrollable precise speech duration generation for autoregressive TTS.
- It adds expressive emotion control through multiple input modalities while keeping zero-shot timbre reproduction.
releaseNotes.en_GB:
- IndexTTS 2.0 tracks the upstream IndexTTS2 release.
- IndexTTS2 adds controllable and uncontrollable precise speech duration generation for autoregressive TTS.
- It adds expressive emotion control through multiple input modalities while keeping zero-shot timbre reproduction.
releaseNotes.it_IT:
- IndexTTS 2.0 tiene traccia della versione upstream IndexTTS2.
- IndexTTS2 aggiunge la generazione precisa della durata del parlato controllabile e incontrollabile per autoregressivo TTS.
- Aggiunge il controllo espressivo delle emozioni attraverso molteplici modalità di input mantenendo la riproduzione del timbro zero-shot.
releaseNotes.nb_NO:
- IndexTTS 2.0 sporer oppstrøms IndexTTS2-utgivelsen.
- IndexTTS2 legger til kontrollerbar og ukontrollerbar presis talevarighetsgenerering for autoregressiv TTS.
- Den legger til uttrykksfull følelseskontroll gjennom flere inputmodaliteter samtidig som den beholder zero-shot klangreproduksjon.
releaseNotes.zh_CN:
- IndexTTS 2.0 对应上游 IndexTTS2 发布。
- IndexTTS2 为自回归 TTS 增加了可控和不可控两种精确语音时长生成方式。
- 它通过多种输入模态增加了富有表现力的情感控制，同时保留 zero-shot 音色复现能力。
releaseNotes.ja_JP:
- IndexTTS 2.0 は upstream の IndexTTS2 リリースに対応しています。
- IndexTTS2 は自回帰 TTS 向けに、制御可能および非制御の精密な音声長生成を追加します。
- zero-shot の音色再現を維持しながら、複数の入力モダリティによる表現力のある感情制御を追加します。
releaseNotes.ko_KR:
- IndexTTS 2.0은 upstream IndexTTS2 릴리스를 따릅니다.
- IndexTTS2는 자기회귀 TTS를 위해 제어 가능 및 비제어 방식의 정밀한 음성 길이 생성을 추가합니다.
- zero-shot 음색 재현을 유지하면서 여러 입력 모달리티를 통한 표현력 있는 감정 제어를 추가합니다.
releaseNotes.fr_FR:
- IndexTTS 2.0 suit la release upstream IndexTTS2.
- IndexTTS2 ajoute une generation precise de duree vocale, controlable et non controlable, pour le TTS autoregressif.
- Il ajoute un controle emotionnel expressif via plusieurs modalites d'entree tout en conservant la reproduction zero-shot du timbre.
releaseNotes.de_DE:
- IndexTTS 2.0 folgt dem upstream IndexTTS2-Release.
- IndexTTS2 ergaenzt fuer autoregressives TTS kontrollierbare und unkontrollierbare praezise Sprachdauer-Erzeugung.
- Es ergaenzt ausdrucksstarke Emotionssteuerung ueber mehrere Eingabemodalitaeten und behaelt die Zero-Shot-Klangfarben-Reproduktion bei.
releaseNotes.sv_SE:
- IndexTTS 2.0 spårar uppströms IndexTTS2 release.
- IndexTTS2 lägger till kontrollerbar och okontrollerbar exakt tallängdsgenerering för autoregressiv TTS.
- Den lägger till uttrycksfull känslokontroll genom flera inmatningsmodaliteter samtidigt som den behåller zero-shot klangfärgsreproduktion.
releaseNotes.el_GR:
- IndexTTS 2.0 παρακολουθεί την κυκλοφορία του upstream IndexTTS2.
- Το IndexTTS2 προσθέτει ελεγχόμενη και ανεξέλεγκτη παραγωγή ακριβούς διάρκειας ομιλίας για αυτοπαλινδρομική TTS.
- Προσθέτει εκφραστικό έλεγχο των συναισθημάτων μέσω πολλαπλών τρόπων εισαγωγής, διατηρώντας παράλληλα zero-shot αναπαραγωγή χροιάς.
releaseNotes.hr_HR:
- IndexTTS 2.0 prati uzvodno izdanje IndexTTS2.
- IndexTTS2 dodaje kontrolirano i nekontrolirano precizno generiranje trajanja govora za autoregresivni TTS.
- Dodaje ekspresivnu kontrolu emocija putem višestrukih modaliteta unosa uz zadržavanje reprodukcije boje zero-shot.
releaseNotes.pt_PT:
- IndexTTS 2.0 rastreia a versão upstream IndexTTS2.
- IndexTTS2 adiciona geração de duração de fala precisa controlável e incontrolável para TTS autorregressivo.
- Adiciona um controlo expressivo das emoções através de múltiplas modalidades de entrada, mantendo a reprodução do timbre zero-shot.
releaseNotes.ru_RU:
- IndexTTS 2.0 отслеживает вышестоящую версию IndexTTS2.
- IndexTTS2 добавляет контролируемую и неконтролируемую точную генерацию длительности речи для авторегрессии TTS.
- Он добавляет выразительный контроль эмоций за счет нескольких модальностей ввода, сохраняя при этом воспроизведение тембра zero-shot.
releaseNotes.tr_TR:
- IndexTTS 2.0 yukarı akışlı IndexTTS2 sürümünü izler.
- IndexTTS2, otoregresif TTS için kontrol edilebilir ve kontrol edilemeyen hassas konuşma süresi oluşturma özelliği ekler.
- zero-shot tını reprodüksiyonunu korurken birden fazla giriş yöntemi aracılığıyla ifade edici duygu kontrolü ekler.

title: Index-TTS
